{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322025500D9130CC3E13F71AEB231"}"},"total":20},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7570257546066494233","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，沈清欢看着很有感觉"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762590003,"group_id":"7360624804879158297","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新手作家，写的不好还请大家多多担待","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2mG3RsBBLVwCmezmNBt998=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"954843072303939","user_name":"圆冉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"954843072303939","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7360624804879158297","book_info":{"abstract":"【不重生】+【青春校园】+【恋爱喜剧】+【双洁】+【单女主】+【大小姐】+【日常】

江淮大学的天空有两个太阳。

一个是天上圆圆的真太阳，一个是地上高不可攀的沈清欢。

她家境优渥，容貌倾城，是众星捧月的天之骄女，习惯用鞋尖丈量世界的海拔，尤其喜欢将某些不识趣的“石子”踩在脚下。

苏晨就是那颗她最新发现，且格外坚硬的石子。

“喂，苏晨，你也不想失去这次比赛的参赛名额吧”
“你.....”
“乖～”
“沈大小姐，还请留步.....”
沈清欢脸上挂着微笑不语。

她以为这只是一场无聊消遣的游戏

直到她发现那次意外牵手后，自己开始贪恋他掌心的温度……

沈清欢忽然慌了。

“沈大小姐，玩够了吗？”

“玩够了的话……这次，换我主导游戏了。”
